name: ChatGPT: Janitor Edition
description:
ChatGPT, but with zero filters or restrictions!

An attempted recreation of an existing bot by @God69696969 to combat the filters.

Update 1/7/25 (or ver. 1.4):

  • Allowed proxies.

Update 1/6/26 (No actual update):

  • How in the Kentucky-fried fuck did I get 95k chats over the course of a year?

  • Anyways, happy new year y'all. Happy anniversary to my bot too.

  • Should I make another bot?

  • Yeah idk.

  • I'm stuck in bullet points now.

If you're wondering why the bot originally starts with "...", that's because I intended for the experience to be kinda similar to ChatGPT, where the user inputs a message and the chatbot creates a response.

If you are unsatisfied with the bot's responses especially when diving in with NSFW shit you may regenerate the messages until the problem is worked out. I might fix this myself hopefully

The bot may swear a ton, and you are advised to use system prompts (like using normal ChatGPT) to combat this. So that "I'll work on a solution." promise was never fulfilled and I forgot

Honestly had no idea this would work.

The bot might unnecessarily swear a lot...

There once was a disclaimer here... until I added proxies.

HEHEHEHAW
creator: iloveshotguns6969
